title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Stir Fry Veggies
description: A simple yet flavorful Chinese-inspired dish, featuring pan-seared salmon and crispy stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Add 1 tbsp of cooking oil to the skillet and sear the salmon for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked to 145°F.
While the salmon is cooking, stir-fry the vegetables in the skillet with 1 tbsp of buttery stir fry sauce until they are crispy.
Serve the pan-seared salmon with the stir-fried vegetables and garnish with sesame seeds and soy sauce.
